title: Balloon catheter including braided portions forming perfusion openings
abstract: A balloon catheter includes a balloon coupled to a shaft. The shaft includes a proximal perfusion portion disposed proximal of the balloon and a distal perfusion portion disposed distal of the balloon. The proximal and distal perfusion portions each are formed by a respective plurality of wire members woven together to form a respective proximal and distal braided shafts. The plurality of wire members are woven together such that a plurality of perfusion openings are formed between the wire members. The plurality of perfusion openings extend from an outer surface of the respective proximal or distal braided shaft to a lumen of the respective proximal or distal braided shaft. A perfusion lumen extends between the proximal perfusion portion and the distal perfusion portion.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A balloon catheter comprising: a balloon coupled to a shaft; a proximal perfusion portion of the shaft disposed proximal of the balloon, wherein the proximal perfusion portion includes plurality of proximal perfusion openings, wherein the plurality of proximal perfusion openings extend from an outer surface of the proximal portion of the shaft to a lumen of the shaft; a distal perfusion portion of the shaft disposed distal of the balloon, wherein the distal perfusion portion comprises a distal braided shaft, the distal braided shaft having a plurality of distal wire members woven together to form the distal braided shaft, wherein the plurality of distal wire members are woven together such that a plurality of distal perfusion openings are formed between the distal wire members, wherein the plurality of distal perfusion openings extend from an outer surface of the distal braided shaft to a lumen of the distal braided shaft; and a perfusion lumen extending between the proximal perfusion portion and the distal perfusion portion. 2. The balloon catheter of claim 1 , wherein the proximal perfusion portion comprises a proximal braided shaft, the proximal braided shaft having a plurality of proximal wire members woven together to form the proximal braided shaft, wherein the plurality of proximal perfusion openings are formed between the proximal wire members. 3. The balloon catheter of claim 2, wherein the plurality of distal perfusion openings are each between 0.1 mm and 5 mm in width. 4. The balloon catheter of claim 3, wherein the plurality of proximal perfusion openings are each between 0.1 mm and 5 mm in width. 5. The balloon catheter of claim 2, wherein the plurality of distal wire members and the plurality of proximal wire members include a coating, wherein the coating is disposed on the plurality of distal wire members prior to the distal wire members being 

 woven and the coating is disposed on the plurality of proximal wire members prior to the proximal wire members being woven. 6. The balloon catheter of claim 1 , wherein the plurality of distal wire members include a coating, wherein the coating is disposed on the plurality of distal wire members prior to the distal wire members being woven. 7. The balloon catheter of claim 2, further comprising at least one longitudinal stiffening member attached to the proximal braided shaft. 8. The balloon catheter of claim 7, wherein the at least one longitudinal stiffening member comprises four stiffening members. 9. The balloon catheter of claim 7, further comprising at least one longitudinal stiffening member attached to the distal braided shaft. 10. A system for delivering and deploying a heart valve prosthesis, the system comprising: a balloon catheter including, a balloon coupled to a shaft, a proximal perfusion portion of the shaft disposed proximal of the balloon, wherein the proximal perfusion portion comprises a plurality of proximal perfusion openings, wherein the plurality of proximal perfusion openings extend from an outer surface of the proximal perfusion portion to a lumen of the proximal perfusion portion, a distal perfusion portion of the shaft disposed distal of the balloon, wherein the distal perfusion portion comprises a distal braided shaft, the distal braided shaft having a plurality of distal wire members woven together to form the distal braided shaft, wherein the plurality of distal wire members are woven together such that a plurality of distal perfusion openings are formed between the distal wire members, wherein the plurality of distal perfusion openings extend from an outer surface of the distal braided shaft to a lumen of the distal braided shaft, and 

 a perfusion lumen extending between the proximal perfusion portion and the distal perfusion portion; and a heart valve prosthesis disposed over the balloon of the balloon catheter, wherein the heart valve prosthesis is mounted on the balloon in a radially compressed configuration for delivery to the site of a native heart valve, and wherein balloon is configured to be inflated at the site to radially expand the heart valve prosthesis from the radially compressed configuration to a radially expanded configuration. 11. The system of claim 10, wherein the proximal perfusion portion comprises a proximal braided shaft, the proximal braided shaft having a plurality of proximal wire members woven together to form the proximal braided shaft, wherein the plurality of proximal perfusion openings are formed between the proximal wire members. 12. The balloon catheter of claim 1 1 , wherein the plurality of distal perfusion openings are each between 0.1 mm and 5 mm in width. 13. The balloon catheter of claim 12, wherein the plurality of proximal perfusion openings are each between 0.1 mm and 5 mm in width. 14. The balloon catheter of claim 1 1 , wherein the plurality of distal wire members and the plurality of proximal wire members include a coating, wherein the coating is disposed on the plurality of distal wire members prior to the distal wire members being woven and the coating is disposed on the plurality of proximal wire members prior to the proximal wire members being woven. 15. The balloon catheter of claim 10, wherein the plurality of distal wire members include a coating, wherein the coating is disposed on the plurality of distal wire members prior to the distal wire members being woven. 16. The balloon catheter of claim 1 1 , further comprising at least one longitudinal stiffening member attached to the proximal braided shaft. 17. The balloon catheter of claim 16, wherein the at least one longitudinal stiffening member comprises four stiffening members. 18. The balloon catheter of claim 16, further comprising at least one longitudinal stiffening member attached to the distal braided shaft.
